chunks.title: Conquest of the Philistines and Zobah
chunks.reason: Describes David's military campaigns against the Philistines, Moab, and Hadadezer king of Zobah.

chunks.title: Acquisition of Spoils and Victory over Edom
chunks.reason: Details the collection of tribute from conquered nations and Abishai's victory in Edom.

chunks.title: Summary of David's Reign and Officials
chunks.reason: Summarizes David's rule and lists the key administrative and military officials.
